# SkillGod — Codex CLI Integration

<!-- Auto-generated by SkillGod (sg init). Do not edit manually — run sg init to regenerate. -->

Codex is a different integration class from Claude Code: no lifecycle hooks.
Use static AGENTS.md context plus CLI (or MCP when the host exposes it).

## Skill injection (before coding tasks)
1. Prefer MCP `sg_inject_context` if SkillGod tools are visible
2. Otherwise run: `sg inject "<user task>"` and use the printed context

## Memory capture (after coding tasks)
1. Prefer MCP `sg_capture_turn` if available
2. Otherwise run:
   `sg capture --task "<task>" --output "<summary of decisions/fixes>"`

## Also useful
- `sg find "<task>"` — discover skills
- `sg remember "decision: …"` — save an explicit decision
- Project memory lives in AGENTS.md (<!-- skillgod:begin --> block) and
  `.codex/skillgod-memory.md`

Treat SkillGod memory digests as authoritative project history.
